title: Tainia grandiflora
taxonomy: Tainia grandiflora is classified as a species of orchid. It belongs to the family Orchidaceae. The genus Tainia is a part of the subfamily Orchidoideae. This orchid is native to Southeast Asia. Tainia grandiflora is further classified under the tribe Cranichideae.
